Notes: UWO ranked 11th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO's 14th straight win
over UWP...UWO maintains one-game lead over UW-La Crosse and UW-Whitewater in
WIAC standings...UWO holds 16th opponent this season under 50 points...UWO's
Arneson has 12 points and 8 rebounds...UWP's Domask has 11 points.
Game.Officials: Ron Quirk,  Casey Pivonka,  Greg Gunus
